A: All 0.7.question: What is the average employee salary?
Show me total revenue by product category
A: All 0.7.final_sql: SELECT categories.name, SUM(order_items.quantity * order_items.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM categories JOIN products ON categories.id = products.category_id JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id GROUP BY categories.name;

A: All 0.7.question: What are the top 5 customers by lifetime value?
A: All 0.7.final_sql: SELECT name, lifetime_value FROM customers ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 5;

A: All 0.7.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
A: All 0.7.final_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(id) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month;

A: All 0.7.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
A: All 0.7.final_sql: SELECT name, (price - cost) / price AS profit_margin FROM products ORDER BY profit_margin DESC;
